id.description: Unique identifier (e.g. UUID) for the task, generated by the server.

contextId.description: Unique identifier for the contextual collection of interactions.

artifacts.description: A set of output artifacts for the task.

history.description: The history of interactions from the task.

metadata.description: A flexible key-value object for custom metadata about the task.

state.description: The current state of the task.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the status was recorded.

artifactId.description: Unique identifier for the artifact within the task.

name.description: A human readable name for the artifact.

description.description: A human readable description of the artifact.

extensions.description: The URIs of extensions that contributed to this Artifact.

messageId.description: The unique identifier of the message.

role.description: Identifies the sender of the message.

parts.description: Parts is the container of the message content.

Part.description: A container for a section of communication content. Exactly one content field is set.

text.description: The string content of the text part.

raw.description: The raw byte content of a file, base64-encoded.

url.description: A URL pointing to the file's content.

data.description: Arbitrary structured data as a JSON value.

metadata.description: Optional metadata associated with this part.

filename.description: An optional filename for the file.

mediaType.description: The MIME type of the part content.
